name: Kid Cadaver
description: '''Kid Cadaver''' is an [[America|American]] [[pop punk]] band formed in 2011 between [[Los Angeles]], [[California]] natives Raymond Venta (lead vocals) / ([[bass guitar]]) and Kenzo Cardenas ([[Drum kit|drums]]). The '''Kid Cadaver''' moniker was adopted by the group to represent the process of growing older and losing sight of one's inner youth.
